markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on messaging updates and plan for accelerating lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Messaging Unblocked:** Flosum will deliver two key assets: a draft for the February "Trust" webinar (security messaging) and a near-final strategic messaging deck (95% complete).](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Parallel Dev Updates Shift:** Flosum will update existing blogs with "Parallel Dev" messaging to free GrowthX to focus on new, high-impact content.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Strategic Growth Push:** Matt will schedule a 30-min sync to plan a "hockey stick" growth strategy, aiming to triple/quadruple lead volume to build a robust enterprise pipeline for Q1/Q2.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**GrowthX Org Changes:** Jacob is transitioning to a backend strategy role, reducing call attendance. Further org restructuring, intended to bolster strategic support, begins Dec 1st.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Growth Initiative

  - [**Goal:** Accelerate lead generation from a steady climb to a "hockey stick" trajectory.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Build a large top-of-funnel pipeline for enterprise sales, which requires long lead times (Q1/Q2).](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**Method:** Increase lead volume by lowering top-of-funnel conversion rates, leveraging current high-quality lead conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**Metrics:** Weekly impressions have doubled since GrowthX started; lead volume has increased from \~10/week to \~40/week.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Action:** Matt will schedule a 30-min strategic sync with GrowthX (including Jacob) to define a plan.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Messaging & Content Strategy

  - [**New Messaging Assets (from Flosum):**](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**"Trust" Webinar Draft:** A high-level thought leadership piece on security and regulated industries.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
          - [**Context:** Supports a February webinar and the internal launch of Flosum's "cloud DevOps" solution.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
          - [**Significance:** Enables Flosum to talk broadly about "DevOps" without cannibalizing its "native" solution.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**Strategic Messaging Deck:** A near-final draft (95% complete) with all content except the aspirational headline.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Parallel Dev Messaging Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Decision:** Flosum will update existing blogs with "Parallel Dev" messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Frees GrowthX to focus on new, high-impact content for the strategic growth push.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [**Resource:** GrowthX provided a list of relevant blogs, prioritized by impressions, and suggested adding messaging to high-traffic pages (e.g., "limitations of change sets").](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### GrowthX Team Updates

  - [**Jacob's Role:** Transitioning to a backend strategy role → will attend fewer syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Org Restructuring:** Further changes begin Dec 1st to add strategic support.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Jessalynn (out Wed+), Rachel (out Tue+), Jacob (out Wed+).](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Flosum (US):** Out Wed-Fri.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** Front-loaded this week to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/v3YskbHwPui7nGPxCWTtMwXQzz_--LJj?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
